violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Chest freezer door handle repaired with tape. Particle board shelving in walk in cooler. Not sealed.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door. Women's restroom not provided with self closing door mechanism

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Walls at dish area damaged and no longer sealed. Exposed plaster

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Recommend using single service towels instead of cloth towels for wiping cloths when using spray bottles sanitizers.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Chest freezer door handle repaired with tape. Particle board shelving in walk in cooler. Not sealed.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door. Women's restroom not provided with self closing door mechanism.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Walls at dish area damaged and no longer sealed. Exposed plaster.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
